notes: Plan profile was --num-layers 16; that run hit Metal OOM (kIOGPUCommandBufferCallbackErrorOutOfMemory) at ~iter 70-80 on the 128 GB machine. Trained at --num-layers 8 instead.

First 200-iter adapter (trained against models/hy3-mlx-base-ar) never emitted EOS and degenerated to token-0 '!' spam: the stock Hy3 chat template only appends eos_token to the final assistant turn when is_training is set, and mlx_lm ChatDataset passes no template kwargs. Discarded.

Retrained against models/hy3-mlx-base-ar-train (scripts/17_prepare_hy3_train_view.py), whose template defaults is_training=true so training sequences end with EOS. Adapter smoke then stopped cleanly at EOS.
Data pack was length-normalized first: rows over 2048 tokens quarantined (see hy3_lite_sft_length_normalization.json).
Checkpoints at 100 and 200 iters; adapters.safetensors is the 200-iter weights.
